evals.prompt: Rewrite a standard Lens Studio component to use @bindUpdateEvent for its per-frame logic and @depends for its interactor dependency.
evals.expected_output: A TypeScript class using Snap Decorators to replace boilerplate event listeners.
expectations: Uses @depends(Asset.Interactor) or similar for dependency injection
Extends the appropriate base class if required by the decorator library
Removes manual this.createEvent('UpdateEvent') calls from Awake

evals.prompt: Implement a lazy calculation of a player's power level using the @memo decorator so it only re-evaluates when dependencies change.
evals.expected_output: A script using @memo to cache a computed property.
expectations: Uses @memo() above a getter or method
Includes complex math/logic that is being cached
Correctly identifies the dependency array for the memoization
